title: Oil tankers transiting Strait of Hormuz 'must be very careful,' Iran Foreign Ministry warns
summary_full: The price of crude oil has sharply spiked as the Strait of Hormuz has been effectively closed as the United States and Israel wage war on Iran.
summary_public: The price of crude oil has sharply spiked as the Strait of Hormuz has been effectively closed as the United States and Israel wage war on Iran.
